meta.title: deeplearning.ai Learner Community Event ft. Roger Smith
meta.description:
deeplearning.ai presents virtual mini-event series for our Learner Community of those taking the AI for Medicine specialization!

#MeetYourMentor: Mentors sharing their personal experiences of breaking into AI
#DeepDive: A deep dive into a specific area that the guest speaker is working on
and more!

This event will be at 4pm PDT on May 28th featuring Roger Smith. Roger is going to introduce how they apply Google AutoML services to surgical training videos to determine whether the AI can derive the same scores as human evaluators of video. 

About Roger Smith: Roger has spent 30 years developing software and simulation systems for defense and healthcare organizations. He has been upskilling in AI and Deep Learning to be able to intelligently manage and lead the AI-focused projects that all organizations are beginning to pursue. He holds a PhD in Computer Science, MS in Statistics, BS in Applied Mathematics, and an MBA.

 
Enroll in the AI For Medicine Specialization here:  https://bit.ly/2UBOUEO
Check out all our courses: https://bit.ly/39yz95P
